name: GitHub - marktantongco/owl-agent-free-ai-proxy-gateway:
snippet: OWL-AGENT is a local-first aggregator for the free tiers of six AI providers — Antigravity, Claude, OpenCode, Copilot, Kiro, Hermes. It sits between your tools (CLI agents, IDE plugins, MCP clients) and the upstream providers, applying:

name: GitHub - marktantongco/owl-agent: OWL::AGENT — Unified Proxy
snippet: A unified gateway that aggregates multiple billing proxies and uses intelligent routing to maximize free-tier limits. Treats proxies as pluggable resources that can be dynamically incorporated without client changes.

name: marktantongco/owl-agent-installer - GitHub
snippet: OWL-AGENT is a complete AI infrastructure deployment system that routes AI model requests through the optimal path — direct for OAuth providers, proxied for China-based APIs, with automatic failover and health monitoring.

name: GitHub - marktantongco/owl-orca-ai-agentic-stack: Free
snippet: TL;DR: One install.sh creates 3 local proxy endpoints that give you free unlimited access to premium AI models (Claude Sonnet 4.5, DeepSeek, GPT-4o) for coding agents — with stream racing, protocol translation, circuit breaking, zero-config injection, and multi-gateway fleet routing.

name: GitHub - marktantongco/owl-orca: OWL-ORCA AI Gateway with
snippet: The OWL-ORCA system routes AI requests through a local proxy and router stack, racing multiple free-tier providers simultaneously. The first provider to respond wins — delivering the lowest possible latency without any cost to the user.

name: owl-agent/README.md at main · marktantongco/owl-agent · GitHub
snippet: It combines a visual proxy builder with real-time synergy scoring, a full compatibility matrix, architecture schematics, and a unified one-click installer — all wrapped in a cyberpunk-themed, mobile-first, GenZ-designed interface.
